title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, discusses prospects for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs, examining whether they will succeed, optimal timing, company differences, and capital sources. Topics include compute commitments at OpenAI, Anthropic's positioning relative to competitors, and whether AI companies function as genuine platforms.
